name: Safeheron
description: Self-custody MPC wallet platform using 3-of-3 key-shard architecture with open-source protocol libraries and developer APIs.

seo.title: Safeheron — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Safeheron: Self-custody MPC wallet platform using 3-of-3 key-shard architecture with open-source protocol libraries and developer APIs.

when_to_use: 3-of-3 MPC wallet for institutional crypto treasury management
Open-source MPC protocol library for custom wallet integrations
Multi-party signing approval for DAO and fund operations
Self-custody key shard management without single point of failure
Developer API for programmable MPC signing workflows

pros: 3-of-3 MPC removes single points of custody
Developer APIs for wallet and signing
cons: Crypto-specific, not a general secrets tool
MPC setup more complex than HSM
review.verdict: Compelling self-custody MPC for crypto teams, but miscategorized as generic secrets management.
review.best_for: Crypto institutions wanting MPC self-custody with open protocols.
review.not_for: Teams that need API keys and TLS certs, not crypto wallets.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
